package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedup() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_before_linear_dedup"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag full sorts used only to remove duplicates where map-backed membership would scale better."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
